metadata.name: Spartan Shield-Saver AI multi-turn conversation regression dataset
metadata.purpose: Catch broad routing, follow-up, budget, catering, venue, task, and fallback issues before demo patches.

scenarios.name: budget aware catering after event creation

turns.user: Create an event called Spring Conference at Student Center on April 30th at 5pm. It is for networking
Create an event called Project Discussion at 4 PM on April 24th in the Student Center
add a task to send reminder emails
mark the reminder emails task complete

scenarios.name: create with catering phrase should not pivot to advice

turns.user: Create an event called Birthday Party for 20 people on April 20th with Chick-Fil-A catering
what is my budget looking like
Create an event called Club Banquet on May 3rd at Webb Center for 30 guests
Create an event called Tech Meetup on May 10th at 6pm
Can I afford a paid venue if my limit is $150?
Create an event called Student Mixer on May 8th at 7pm
How many guests should I plan for?
Create an event called Career Workshop for 25 people at Student Center on May 12th
